message:
style(web): overlay chrome primitives + typography hierarchy

- Add OverlayChrome primitive + tokenized overlay chrome (header/content/footer) to unify modal/bottom-sheet layout.
- Preload JetBrainsMono fonts in the web app shell to reduce layout shift and keep data rendering crisp.
- Add/standardize typography utilities (incl font-data) and apply to core UI surfaces (PhageList, DiffHighlighter, TrackContainer).
- Polish Welcome modal UX: clearer step indicator copy, consistent button styles, Enter triggers primary action.
- Refine motion/FX styling (CRT + MatrixRain) and tighten mobile overrides/FAB/control-deck CSS for a more consistent premium feel.

files.patch:
@@ -20,8 +20,10 @@
     <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/favicon.svg" />
     <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="/apple-touch-icon.png" />
     <title>Phage Explorer Web</title>
-    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
-    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
+    <!-- Preload primary monospace to reduce layout shift on first render -->
+    <link rel="preload" href="/fonts/JetBrainsMono-Regular.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin />
+    <link rel="preload" href="/fonts/JetBrainsMono-Medium.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin />
+    <link rel="preload" href="/fonts/JetBrainsMono-Bold.woff2" as="font" type="font/woff2" crossorigin />
     <link rel="stylesheet" href="/src/styles.css" />
   </head>
   <body>
